headline: Technical Consultant: AI, WordPress, and Developer Enablement
subheadline: Where tech meets tenacity — and Java isn’t just coffee.

impactStrip.label: Customer-facing technical, support, community, and operations work
Live or public proof across AI, Cloudflare, and WordPress
Ownership from discovery and scoping through launch support
Support, product, engineering, documentation, and community coverage
Workflow prototyping paired with durable web delivery

summary: Technical consultant focused on AI-assisted workflows, WordPress platforms, and customer-facing technical operations. I build integrations, documentation, and support workflows that reduce friction and make systems easier for teams and customers to use. Recent public work includes Prompt Forge, HPerkins.com, and the wp-hperkins-com WordPress portfolio stack.
differentiator: I combine WordPress and TypeScript delivery with documentation, QA, and support habits — so teams ship systems that are easier to maintain, explain, and hand off after launch.

items: Reduce onboarding friction with enablement, support, and clearer documentation
Turn escalations into reproducible issues and actionable next steps
Translate customer conversations into product and service feedback loops
Support developer and partner communities with practical education
Ship WordPress, WooCommerce, and Cloudflare-backed web experiences
Prototype AI-assisted workflows with safe handoff and support guardrails
Integrate and debug REST APIs across publishing and support flows
Build reusable documentation that improves maintainability after launch
Lead high-volume teams while protecting service quality and execution standards
Coach teammates and standardize workflows so delivery stays consistent
Bridge support, product, engineering, and community stakeholders
Improve processes, reporting, and service quality across operational work

experience.title: Independent Technology Consultant
experience.location: Greater Chicago Area, IL (Open to US remote)
highlights: Scoped and delivered customer-facing workflow projects (WordPress builds, API integrations, documentation, and AI-assisted triage prototypes) from discovery through launch and post-launch support.
Built reusable documentation and API-connected automation that reduced manual handoffs and improved maintainability across client engagements.
Shipped WordPress, WooCommerce, and Cloudflare-backed web experiences with structured content models, smoke-check automation, and deployment workflows.

experience.title: Shift Supervisor
highlights: Coordinated frontline teams across high-volume shifts, handling escalations and maintaining service, safety, and workflow standards during peak periods.
Coached baristas on repeatable operating routines so staffing changes and rush windows did not break service consistency.
Reduced customer-facing friction by standardizing handoff procedures and escalation paths during daily operations.

experience.title: Starbucks Manager
highlights: Ran daily operations for a Starbucks unit with accountability for food safety, service quality, staffing, and inventory.
Coached staff and standardized service execution to keep quality consistent across busy shifts.
Balanced staffing, stock, and customer-experience expectations in a high-volume environment.

experience.title: Freelance Artist / Consultant
highlights: Provided customer-facing product consulting and education that helped shoppers choose appropriate skincare and cosmetics solutions.
Built repeat engagement through consultative service, clear recommendations, and trust-based communication.

experience.title: Happiness Engineer
highlights: Resolved customer issues across WordPress.com publishing, site configuration, billing, and domain/DNS workflows — turning recurring problems into documentation, bug reports, and reproducible details for product and engineering.
Reduced confusion around account and site configuration by delivering clear written troubleshooting that addressed root causes, not just symptoms.
Contributed to internal knowledge-base improvements by identifying patterns in support volume and documenting reusable solutions for the team.

experience.title: Community Manager
highlights: Supported a developer community around the PageLines ecosystem through onboarding content, tutorials, and day-to-day relationship management.
Helped marketplace participants get productive faster by pairing education with community support.
Translated community questions and feedback into clearer product priorities and developer guidance.

experience.title: Customer Service Representative
highlights: Supported customers in a fast-paced retail technology environment where troubleshooting and clear communication directly affected satisfaction.
Contributed to loss prevention, internal communication, and inventory process improvements that kept store operations dependable.

experience.title: Writing Coach / Editor
highlights: Coached Chicago-area students through writing and journalism workshops that strengthened communication, editing, and storytelling skills.
Edited student work and turned feedback into clear next revisions.

projects.name: Prompt Forge
projects.description: Prompt platform for designing, iterating on, and organizing AI prompts.
projects.impact: Built a TypeScript-based prompt platform with a public repo, production deployment, and features for prompt building, storage, and community sharing.

projects.name: HPerkins.com
projects.description: React + TypeScript portfolio app with GitHub-backed work data, case studies, and blog content.
projects.impact: Implemented a portfolio stack that combines React, TypeScript, GitHub-backed content, CI checks, and Cloudflare deployment workflows for hperkins.com.

projects.name: WordPress Portfolio (wp-hperkins-com)
projects.description: Public WordPress repository containing the custom henrys-digital-canvas theme used for the portfolio site.
projects.impact: Maintained a custom WordPress portfolio theme in a public repo with smoke-check automation for the WordPress stack.

certifications: Certified Professional Food Manager (CPFM), ServSafe (previously held)
